mapper.select: SELECT c.*, COALESCE(cs_stats.studentCount, 0) AS studentCount FROM sys_class c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT class_id, COUNT(*) AS studentCount FROM sys_class_student WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY class_id ) cs_stats ON cs_stats.class_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_class_student cs JOIN sys_class c ON cs.class_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND cs.status = 1

SELECT c.class_name AS name, COALESCE(cs_stats.studentCount, 0) AS studentCount FROM sys_class c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT class_id, COUNT(*) AS studentCount FROM sys_class_student WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY class_id ) cs_stats ON cs_stats.class_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId}

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.role, MAX(cs.join_time) AS join_time, si.student_number, si.class_name AS admin_class, si.college, si.school, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT c.class_name ORDER BY c.class_name SEPARATOR '、') AS class_name FROM users u JOIN sys_class_student cs ON u.id = cs.student_id JOIN sys_class c ON cs.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_student_info si ON u.id = si.user_id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND cs.status = 1 GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.role, si.student_number, si.class_name, si.college, si.school ORDER BY si.student_number ASC, u.id ASC

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.role, cs.join_time, si.student_number, si.class_name AS admin_class, si.college, si.school FROM users u JOIN sys_class_student cs ON u.id = cs.student_id LEFT JOIN sys_student_info si ON u.id = si.user_id JOIN sys_class c ON cs.class_id = c.id WHERE cs.class_id = #{classId} AND c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND cs.status = 1 ORDER BY si.student_number ASC, u.id ASC

SELECT c.*, COALESCE(cs_stats.studentCount, 0) AS studentCount FROM sys_class c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT class_id, COUNT(*) AS studentCount FROM sys_class_student WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY class_id ) cs_stats ON cs_stats.class_id = c.id WHERE c.id IN
#{classId}
